summary: Loading state displays correctly with proper navigation structure and mobile layout. Shows expected loading indicator and maintains admin interface consistency.

violations.description: Admin interface uses dark theme with purple/blue accents that visually diverges from the diner palette (teal #9fd8d2, cream #fff8ea, pink #ffb3c7) defined for public surfaces, creating brand discontinuity between public and authenticated experiences.

actions: Consider evaluating whether the admin interface should maintain closer visual alignment with the diner brand palette to ensure consistent brand experience across public and authenticated surfaces
